notes: The maze rendering is broken (walls drawn as hollow rectangles instead of filled blue corridors), ghost pathfinding gets stuck due to flawed tile-center snapping and coordinate math mixing MAZE_X offset inconsistently, pellet count doesn't match the template causing premature level-clear, and ghosts frequently clip through walls making the game largely unplayable.
A very solid implementation with good ghost AI and states, but lacks instant direction reversal for Pac-Man and uses simplified blocky walls instead of continuous lines.

A competent and mostly complete Pac-Man clone with working movement, ghosts, pellets, power mode, lives, and levels, but the maze rendering is simplistic and several behaviors/authentic details are simplified or slightly off from a proper polished Pac-Man build.
